title: Concurrent OSCORE unprotect can accept the same replayed request twice
description: oscore_unprotect_request() checks replay_check_acceptable() under the mutex, releases the mutex for decryption, then reacquires it and calls replay_update_window(). replay_update_window() returns true even when another thread already marked the same sequence while this thread was decrypting, and the caller ignores the return value. Trigger: two RX/workqueue contexts process the same authentic OSCORE request concurrently. Bad behavior: both calls can return OSCORE_OK and deliver the same request to the application, violating OSCORE replay protection and enabling duplicated non-idempotent CoAP operations. Locations: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c:1328-1349 and :1380-1387.
